title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 145.846 - Application for review, filing
text:
145.846.  Application for review, filing. — An application for review of the director of revenue's determination pursuant to sections 145.011 to 145.995 shall be filed by the executor with the administrative hearing commission under section 621.050.
(L. 1980 S.B. 539) 
Effective 1-1-81
